seo.title: Apparel AI Promotional Video – Fashion Video Generator | OpenCreator
seo.description: Create professional fashion promotional videos with AI. Transform clothing and accessory images into dynamic model videos with multiple scenes and camera angles—perfect for fashion brands and apparel marketing.

hero.title: Apparel AI Promotional Video
hero.description: Create professional fashion promotional videos from your product images. Upload a model photo, clothing, and accessories—Nano Banana Pro combines them into styled scenes, then generates dynamic video clips from multiple angles. Perfect for fashion brands needing high-quality video content without expensive productions.

steps.title: Upload model and apparel images
steps.description: Provide a base model photo along with the clothing items (coat, dress, etc.) and accessories (bags, jewelry) you want to showcase. The AI will combine them naturally.

steps.title: AI creates styled model images
steps.description: Nano Banana Pro dresses the model in your apparel, replacing outfits and adding accessories while maintaining the model's identity and natural proportions across multiple poses.

steps.title: Generate diverse scene variations
steps.description: The workflow creates multiple styled images with different poses, angles, and compositions—from full-body fashion shots to detail close-ups showcasing specific items.

steps.title: Transform images into video clips
steps.description: Each styled image is animated into a dynamic video clip with natural movements. The final output includes multiple video segments ready for social media or brand campaigns.

items.question: What is the Apparel AI Promotional Video workflow?
items.answer: This AI-powered workflow creates professional fashion promotional videos. It combines your model photos with clothing and accessories to generate multiple styled scenes, then transforms each into dynamic video clips for marketing and social media.

items.question: What AI models power this workflow?
items.answer: The workflow uses Nano Banana Pro for image generation—dressing models in your apparel and creating diverse poses. Video generation transforms these styled images into dynamic clips with natural movement.

items.question: What images do I need to provide?
items.answer: You need a base model photo, clothing items (like coats, dresses, tops), and any accessories (bags, jewelry) you want to include. The AI combines them realistically in the generated content.

items.question: How many video clips does the workflow generate?
items.answer: The workflow generates multiple styled images from different angles, each converted into a video clip. You'll receive several video segments showcasing your apparel from various perspectives.

items.question: Will the clothing fit naturally on the model?
items.answer: Yes. Nano Banana Pro specializes in realistic apparel placement. The clothing will appear properly fitted with natural draping, proportions, and integration with the model's pose.

items.question: Can I showcase multiple outfit combinations?
items.answer: Yes. The workflow can combine different clothing pieces and accessories in the same run, allowing you to create coordinated looks or highlight specific items.

items.question: What video formats are supported?
items.answer: The generated videos are optimized for social media platforms and can be used on Instagram, TikTok, product pages, and brand campaigns. Standard video formats are supported.

items.question: How does pricing work for this workflow?
items.answer: Credits are consumed based on the AI models used. Nano Banana Pro (50% discount) handles image generation, and video generation converts each scene into dynamic content.
